tags.evidence: The manuscript in his suitcase when he crossed
By 1940 Benjamin was in flight
in case he did not make it
it has caught itself in the wings
would like to stay, to awaken the dead
the angel sees one single catastrophe
This storm is what we call progress
a description of the wizard's posture
The image is not a metaphor
what was enclosed to make the forward motion possible
Face the debris
Refuse to be blown into the next thing
turn around. Face the debris
The angel can only see, which is different
register what was lost as actually lost
what was killed as actually killed
To see is to refuse the official forgetting
a quality of light no one alive has seen
the official story and its underside
He read the arcades because they were the dream-image
the seam between the dream and what the dream actually was
still there, attending to you, asking to be read
feel the specific weight of what it once dreamed
feel the specific weight of what it once dreamed itself to be
held in the hand long enough to see
would later give this move a name
the practice was older than the name
where capital deposits its wreckage
something the planners did not design begins to be made
the encounters that read the wreckage
The wizard reads the city
The wizard reads the city the way the tracker reads
The seed is in the wreckage
The seed is in the wreckage
Benjamin had a name for what happens
He called it the dialectical image
the moment it can be recognized
The moment of its legibility does
This is what the wizard is doing in the city
The chip from the cut flashed up
until a specific fragment becomes legible
two people walking the Scar had spent years learning to read
The cedar is no longer cedar; it is a witness
Hold it long enough that the present can use it
it is a witness held in the hand
The grammar of the world rearranges
The angel is mad by the logic of progress
mad by the logic of progress
The angel sees too much
smile at the supervisor whose smile carries the weight
a clinical name and a prescription pad
To face the wreckage
Klee was named degenerate by the Nazis
The angel was on the list
His paintings were taken down from museums
the one walking rather than lying on the couch
the clear sight of a subject who has refused
refused the triangulation the system uses
The angel is one of these
To take the angel's posture
asking you to take it anyway
The risk is real
The angel cannot stand alone for long
cannot stand alone for long
too much for one body to register
carried his words across the border he could not
the descent requires a community that knows how to receive
Benjamin had Arendt, who carried his words
The wizard finds the others
a reading group in someone's kitchen
Erin at the edge of the hedgerow at dusk
the sight does not have to be carried alone
the group's awareness shifts, and everyone attends
It makes the grief possible to hold
It is really beautiful
makes the grief possible to hold
The angel in a roomful of angels is a council
what you saw stays seen because someone else also sees
you are not the only witness
Not every witness is on the line
Zuccotti Park in October 2011
the encampment at the headwaters of any river
Their refusal made physical
Their refusal made physical
watching through the screen as friends do the thing
the line is held by people on the line
Someone is keeping a household together
the screen-distance between you and the friends
There is a grief in the back line
Not as consolation. As honest accounting
That grief is real
the neighbor on the walk
the defense requires whatever the reader actually has
the reader has a specific gift
You pay attention. You look for ways to be helpful
you do not refuse the courage you do
I have been in three wreckages I can tell you about
The first was a forest in Washington
the planted forest — extremely tall, skinny trees
deer still walking their trails
The forest was already wrong before you reached the cut
used by deer, bear, raccoon, possum
The Cooper's hawk I first really saw was hunting there
it looked and felt like a scar on the land
You could feel it before you got there
The light changed. The smell changed
And there was the grief
you know how grief moves and transforms in the body
how grief moves and transforms in the body
If you find yourself holding this grief for the land
not meant to be borne by one person
find others before it consumes you
One day we took a chip
that is the lesson from that ceremony
you know the shard that is yours to take
if you do not know, you know that you do not know
The chip sat above the bar at our restaurant
sat above the bar at our restaurant for years
Very few people have touched it
there for the people who know
The chip remembers the pile
Trees remember
It is easy to forget the hard things
how hard it is for me to go to Home Depot
felt the kitchen floors of the houses they took
The wreckage is not metaphor; it is geological
The collector finds the corner store
a community garden in the right-of-way
The third was a restaurant
The chip was above the bar the whole time
The seeds are the meals that worked
succeeded in some unpredictable ones
a cook who learned a knife skill and took it elsewhere
